name: BookStack
description: BookStack is a free, open-source, self-hosted wiki and documentation platform built with PHP and Laravel. It provides a REST API for managing the full content hierarchy including books, chapters, pages, and shelves, as well as attachments, image galleries, comments, roles, users, audit logs, imports, search, tags, and content permissions.
featureList: Hierarchical content organization (Shelves, Books, Chapters, Pages)

target.description: REST API providing programmatic access to books, chapters, pages, shelves, attachments, image galleries, comments, roles, users, audit logs, imports, recycle bin, search, tags, content permissions, and system information.

subjectOf.name: BookStack REST API
subjectOf.description: The BookStack REST API provides programmatic access to manage the full content hierarchy of a BookStack instance.
